title: Newman and Cole Natural Wooden Hand Brushes - Choose from Hard Stiff Bristle Brush or Soft Brush with Natural or Synthetic Bristles (1 x Coco Soft Hand Brush)
features: QUALITY HAND HELD CLEANING BRUSH - The Newman and Cole wooden hand brush uses soft natural coco fibers to easily ,and efficiently remove unwanted particles from any surface. As an everyday hand brush, it is very flexible and can be used as a floor brush, workshop brush, or carpet brush

COMFORTABLE GRIP - The ergonomically shaped handle of our wooden brushes are not only for aesthetic purposes but works to provide a decent sized surface area - for you to easily grip on to. It’s shape is wide enough to fit your palm, allowing you to maneuver our hand held cleaning brush comfortably and with ease - regardless of angle.

HEAVY DUTY BRUSH - The soft, natural coco fiber bristles of our coco hand brush are firmly attached to its wooden base. Even with continuous heavy use, the bristles will remain firm while the wood base of our cleaner brush won't easily rot, even when continuously exposed to water. You are assured that the Newman and Cole handheld brush will last for a long time.

MULTI-FUNCTIONAL - Our hand brush with coco fiber bristles is a very effective and convenient cleaner brush to use around the house. It can be used as a floor cleaning brush, a workshop brush or to brush carpet clean of any dust or dirt. And because of its quality, you wont need to buy new hand brushes for cleaning any time soon.
TRUSTED BRAND - Newman and Cole know what you want from a broom and aim to deliver exactly that!
description: Product Description Newman and Cole Coco Hand Brush This soft bristle brush captures fine dust and debris while being gentle on delicate surfaces like wood floors and carpets. Newman and Cole Hand Brushes for All Types of Cleaning! Previous page Easy Cleaning Multi-Purpose Cleaning Versatile enough to be used as a carpet brush, stair brush, or even a car cleaning brush. Coco Bristles Natural Bristles Sustainably sourced, these soft bristles are perfect for gentle yet effective cleaning of carpets. Comfortable Use Smooth Handle Adds durability and a polished finish, ensuring the soft brush is built to last. Next page 1 Multi-Purpose Cleaning 2 Natural Bristles 3 Smooth Handle Multi-purpose Hand Brush For cleaning Indoor floors, workshop, carpet Clean with care and precision using the Coco Hand Brush. This soft hand brush is crafted with 100% natural soft coco bristles, making it an excellent choice for delicate surfaces like carpets and wood floors. Its ergonomic curved handle and smooth wooden stock ensure comfortable handling and durability. What materials are used in this soft hand brush? The brush is made with 100% natural coco bristles, a polished wooden stock, and an ergonomic curved handle, making it durable. Is this soft brush suitable for delicate surfaces? Yes, the soft bristles are gentle and safe for use on carpets, stairs, and wood floors, ensuring scratch-free cleaning. How do I store this carpet brush for cleaning when not in use? The brush includes a hanging eye, allowing you to store it neatly and access it easily whenever needed. What tasks can this soft bristle brush be used for? This versatile cleaning brush is perfect for cleaning stairs, carpets, and wood floors. It also works as a car cleaning brush for vehicle interiors. How is the handle designed for comfortable use? The curved handle provides an ergonomic grip, making it easy to use this soft sweeping brush for extended cleaning sessions without strain.
